name: Che (fractured identity)
_note: The Che bug reincarnate: seed the WRONG deezer id (234701081 = a different soul/latin Che) alongside the rapper's real spotify/apple/soundcloud ids. The MB anchor (albums) + cohesion (top-tracks) must drop every deezer-sourced (soul) item and every forbidden soul title. contamination must be 0.

name: Che (clean identity)
_note: The same artist with the deezer edge already scrubbed (the state verify-on-persist leaves). No deezer is ever queried, so the discography must be the rapper's, complete, contamination-free — the clean baseline.

name: Drake (mainstream control)
_note: An unambiguous mainstream artist, seed-only (deezer). No same-name risk; it exists to keep the metadata-coverage metric honest on a well-populated catalogue, not to test contamination.
